name: Adapter Control Server
description: A small HTTP server that runs on each adapter's management port, exposing REST endpoints for health checks (/health), metrics (/metrics), status information (/status), and routing configuration (/routing).

types.name: AdapterControlServer

fields.name: _adapter
fields.description: The adapter instance this control server manages

fields.name: _server
fields.description: The underlying asyncio TCP server instance

types.description: Management HTTP server for a single adapter that handles control API requests

functions.name: __init__
functions.description: Initialize the AdapterControlServer with an adapter instance. Sets up the server but does not start it.
preconditions: adapter must be a valid Adapter instance
postconditions: _adapter is set to the provided adapter
_server is initialized to None

functions.name: is_running
functions.description: Property that checks if the control server is currently running by verifying the server exists and is serving.
postconditions: Returns True if _server is not None and is_serving() returns True
Returns False otherwise

functions.name: start
functions.description: Start the control server on the adapter's management port. Creates an asyncio TCP server and begins listening for HTTP requests.

error_cases.name: OSError
error_cases.condition: Port already in use or binding fails

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: adapter.node does not have expected attributes

preconditions: _adapter.node must have valid host and management_port attributes
postconditions: _server is set to a running asyncio.Server instance
Server is listening on node.host:node.management_port
Log message is written with server details

structured_side_effects.description: Binds TCP server to management port
Logs info message about server listening

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Stop the control server if it is running. Closes the server and waits for all connections to close.
postconditions: If _server was not None, it is closed and awaited
_server is set to None

functions.name: _handle
functions.description: Handle an incoming HTTP request to the control API. Parses HTTP request line, routes to appropriate handler based on path, and writes response. Supports GET requests to /health, /metrics, /status, /routing. Returns 404 for other paths.

error_cases.name: TimeoutError
error_cases.condition: Reading request line takes more than 5 seconds

error_cases.name: GenericException
error_cases.condition: Any exception during request handling is caught and logged

preconditions: reader and writer are valid asyncio stream objects
postconditions: HTTP response is written to writer
writer is closed

functions.name: _handle_health
functions.description: Handle GET /health endpoint. Calls adapter health_check and returns JSON with health status including node name, verdict, latency, and detail.
postconditions: Returns JSON string with health data
JSON contains keys: node, verdict, latency_ms, detail

functions.name: _handle_metrics
functions.description: Handle GET /metrics endpoint. Returns JSON with adapter metrics including request counts, status codes, bytes forwarded, latency statistics, and active connections.

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: metrics object missing expected attributes or methods

preconditions: _adapter.metrics must exist and have expected attributes
postconditions: Returns JSON string with metrics data
JSON contains keys: requests_total, requests_failed, bytes_forwarded, last_latency_ms, status_2xx, status_3xx, status_4xx, status_5xx, active_connections, latency_p50, latency_p95, latency_p99

functions.name: _handle_status
functions.description: Handle GET /status endpoint. Returns JSON with adapter status including node name, listening address, proxy mode, backend configuration, and routing strategy if applicable.
postconditions: Returns JSON string with status data
JSON contains keys: node, listening, mode, backend, running
If routing exists, JSON also contains routing_strategy and routing_locked

functions.name: _handle_routing
functions.description: Handle GET /routing endpoint. Returns JSON with routing configuration. If no routing object exists, returns single backend strategy. Otherwise returns routing model dump.

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: routing object missing model_dump method or backend missing attributes

postconditions: Returns JSON string with routing configuration
If routing is None, returns single strategy with backend info
If routing exists, returns routing.model_dump() as JSON

functions.name: _write_response
functions.description: Static method to write an HTTP response with given status code and JSON body to the writer stream. Constructs HTTP/1.1 response headers and body.

inputs.name: writer
inputs.description: Stream writer to write response to

error_cases.name: UnicodeEncodeError
error_cases.condition: body contains characters that cannot be UTF-8 encoded

preconditions: writer must be a valid StreamWriter
status should be a valid HTTP status code
body should be a valid string
postconditions: HTTP response headers are written to writer
Response body is written to writer
Content-Type is set to application/json
Connection is set to close

structured_side_effects.description: Writes HTTP response headers and body

invariants: _server is None when not running, asyncio.Server when running
All responses are JSON with Content-Type: application/json
All connections use Connection: close header
Status code mapping: 200='OK', 404='Not Found', 500='Internal Server Error'
